title: Contributing to gsm.safety
text: repository follows gsm package development conventions useful early-stage experimental package.

title: Contributing to gsm.safety
text: File link issue describing intended change. Run relevant local checks possible. Keep workflow/report changes tied GitHub issue motivates .

title: Contributing to gsm.safety
text: repository uses GitHub Actions templates Gilead-BioStats/gsm.utils: R-CMD-check.yaml — R CMD check pull requests. test-coverage.yaml — test coverage reporting. pkgdown-.yaml — pkgdown site build/deploy PR previews. r-releaser-caller.yaml — release automation. workflow-template-check.yaml — checks workflow templates gsm.utils. first automation PR intentionally ports standard suite documenting repo-specific follow-work #8.

what: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: gsm.safety R package generating clinical safety visualization artifacts Good Statistical Monitoring workflows. first release, v0.1.0, focuses workflow-driven SafetyCharts HTML widget reports. Reports defined YAML, run workr::RunWorkflow(), rendered gsm.safety::RenderSafetyChartsWidget() using reproducible gsm.datasim-backed example data.

title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: repository contains: Integration design AE Explorer gap analysis workr-shaped report workflows inst/workflow/3_reports/ Interactive SafetyCharts HTML report artifacts rendered safetyCharts::render_widget() Pkgdown examples run report YAML workflows workr::RunWorkflow() GitHub Actions R CMD check, pkgdown, coverage, workflow-template checks package intentionally avoids wrapping full SafetyGraphics Shiny app. current scope standalone report artifacts can generated GSM-style mapped data. Nep Explorer excluded v0.1.0 legacy htmlwidget path longer supported; future NEP support considered Shiny-app pipeline static graphic.

title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: implemented workflows keep report contract YAML use MakeExampleData() reproducible examples: meta$domains maps GSM workflow data names, currently Mapped_SUBJ, Mapped_AE, Mapped_LB, domain shapes expected SafetyCharts widget. meta$widgetSettings stores widget column mapping used safetyCharts, including sex current example grouping variable supported. Workflows call relevant safetyCharts::init_*() helper one exists; widgets without init helper pass data/settings directly renderer. gsm.safety::RenderSafetyChartsWidget() renders widget safetyCharts::render_widget() writes standalone HTML report. YAML authoritative configuration, generated HTML widget report artifact.

title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: project intentionally use renv yet. dependency surface still changing, first release establish core package/API boundaries adding lockfile maintenance. Run AE Explorer workflow example : source checkout, use: pkgdown examples use workr::RunWorkflow() workflow YAML files render returned htmlwidget output. Run local checks : shell R installed:
code: source(system.file("examples", "run-ae-explorer-workflow.R", package = "gsm.safety")) source("inst/examples/run-ae-explorer-workflow.R") rcmdcheck::rcmdcheck(args = "--no-manual") R CMD check --no-manual gsm.safety

title: Safety Visualizations for Good Statistical Monitoring Workflows
text: Merge PR #26 cut first v0.1.0 release available SafetyCharts widget reports. Harden GSM--SafetyCharts mapping contract real gsm.mapping outputs. Decide dependency strategy remote SafetyCharts/Tendril dependencies versus vendoring reimplementation. Review FDA ST&F / Duke-Margolis materials create issues static safety displays. Revisit NEP support Shiny app pipeline static graphic rather legacy htmlwidget.

title: Save an initialized safetyCharts widget as standalone HTML — RenderSafetyChartsWidget
text: lInitialized list returned safetyCharts::init_*() helper data settings entries. strWidgetName Name safetyCharts htmlwidget render. strOutputDir Directory HTML report written. strOutputFile Output file stem filename. .html appended absent.
